description: The interrogative for asking what thing, action, quality, or concept fills a gap. Before a noun it also asks which member or kind is meant. People take 'sua' (who), while quantity takes 'wia' (how many).
articulatory_notes: A breathy 'h' leads into stressed high-front 'i'. Dental nasal 'n' closes the second syllable's onset before the tongue releases onto open 'a'.
usage_notes: The word stands exactly where the answer would stand. A content question using 'hina' does not also take the yes-or-no particle 'wa'.
